name: python3-xdg
title: python3-xdg
summary: Python 3 library to access freedesktop.org standards
description:
Python 3 library to access freedesktop.org standards
PyXDG contains implementations of freedesktop.org standards in Python:
.
* Base Directory Specification Version 0.6
* Menu Specification Version 1.0
* Desktop Entry Specification Version 1.0
* Icon Theme Specification Version 0.8
* Recent File Spec 0.2
* Shared-MIME-Database Specification 0.13
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-xdg because Python 3 library to access freedesktop.org standards.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-xdg as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-xdg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-xdg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
